name: Time-Lapse ROI Profiling and Data Extraction
description: Perform quantitative time-series analysis on the 'Mitosis (26MB, 5D stack)' sample image. Create a Maximum Intensity Projection to collapse the Z-dimension while preserving the time series, then analyze the Red channel (Microtubules). Identify at least 3 distinct cells or regions and generate intensity traces for these regions across all 51 time frames. Save the measurement results to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/time_series_traces.csv' and the ROI set to '~/ImageJ_Data/results/cell_rois.zip'.
